name: product-factory-os
description: Product Factory OS methodology plugin for Codex: a deterministic product generation runtime that installs as a workspace default, auto-adopts existing projects, classifies product ideas, selects templates, compiles blueprints into execution graphs, runs hook guardrails, builds, tests, validates, prepares deployment, and saves reloadable state.

interface.shortDescription: A Product Factory OS workflow from rough idea to deploy-ready product.
interface.longDescription: Product Factory OS turns Codex into a deterministic Product Factory OS: route the request, classify product type, select a reusable template, compile product blueprints into execution graphs, build in gated modules, test, review, harden, prepare deployment, and preserve reloadable state.
defaultPrompt: Turn my app idea into a Product Factory OS execution graph.
Turn on Caveman mode for terse technical replies.
Run an SEO audit for this landing page.
Review this project before I ship.
